daily.today_energy: Mercury's vibes are keeping you sharp and curious. There's this magnetic pull toward conversations that actually matter—lean into it. Your energy is giving thoughtful but playful, and people are noticing.
daily.love: If you're coupled up, today's a good day to get vulnerable about something small. Single? That person keeps crossing your mind for a reason. Trust your gut on whether to make a move.
daily.career: You're seeing the bigger picture now, and it's changing how you approach your work. That project or conversation you've been hesitating on? Today's the day to go for it with confidence.
daily.health: Your nervous system's been working overtime. Today, do something that feels grounding—whether that's time outside, stretching, or just unplugging for an hour. Your body's asking for it.

weekly.overview: Mercury's dancing through your sector of introspection, so this week is giving major clarity energy. You're finally seeing through some dynamics that had you confused, and honestly? It feels relieving. Trust the realizations hitting you.
weekly.love: Venus is subtly shifting your vibe, making you more magnetic in ways you don't even realize. If you're single, someone's probably noticing. If you're coupled up, this is the week to actually say the things you've been rehearsing in your head.
weekly.career: The professional cosmos is lowkey asking you to stop playing small. That idea you've been sitting on? It's time. You've got enough clarity now to pitch it without overthinking. Your conviction matters more than perfection.
weekly.health: Your nervous system could use some actual downtime—not just scrolling in bed, but real rest. Movement helps too; something that feels good rather than punishing. Listen to what your body's asking for this week.
